textByHash.a969d1637e1ab6831638757c3ac1fa258c37b40a: There's a list pinned up on the camp notice board, near the toilet. Have a look there for useful things you could do. I've got some rewards if you do them all!
textByHash.44810b4f90bc13d6b840bdc2f52b44eae8d06337: I see you've finished building the camp for us.
textByHash.3480c916b9a049026f0262eb274b6c79d3f25c15: Thank you so much for your help! Here, take these fossils. I found them while panning! They're everywhere on this island... A quick clean up by the benches you built should help identify them.
textByHash.d4a93ea3ce9537a595eaa4b210d3af6bb3f97f79: Sure, would you like to talk about? Normal or rare fossils?
textByHash.b51b9d455dfea764e6f4501a07fae23fa3495e59: Oh definitely! Did you find a new type of fossil?!
textByHash.a0f4e08a8f9caccc4ae696241296f820697d9e80: Oh..., I can do that for you, if you really want me to.
textByHash.bd92a2d47661369bac487b62f8637c926295b8c0: So be it, I'll spread the word, rare fossils won't drop for you anymore. Come back to me if you change your mind.
textByHash.93ef99034ce2c5c4e76a28d42fca6684ae325fe5: Oh wonderful! Rare fossils are so hard to find, I'd hate for you to miss out on one.
textByHash.41f163a9366fe1230473c14d239ba44f88885142: So you've changed your mind then? I knew you would, who can resists the hidden knowledge found in rare fossils?
textByHash.050d4076aac2fd5c97c003a9a558f6464ec25d6e: If that's what you really want.
textByHash.a2b7063bf438bb2e065c647d73056d3186f117c8: Of course you are! I'll get the word out and you'll start to see rare fossils drop again.
textByHash.b888a554272b2c9cd423181bd1c26e278e35b150: Fine, just let me know if you actually change your mind.
textByHash.662f379d691173b63c8b160238ebf094d91c2ace: Of course, I'm always up for an exciting discussion about fossils.
textByHash.194978430df2f5f22bb063decf42c320ac70b051: Oh... I guess can see what I can do, Only if you're sure of course.
textByHash.3575a5a5ae039af0c2fc80b58a452d476309c5e1: Fine... I'll spread the word, you won't see fossils dropped on the island anymore... Come back to me if you change your mind.
textByHash.19a02c09eebf04069ff5794da32132ccee9ed167: Really?! That's fantastic! Fossils are so much fun, you'd be missing out!
textByHash.ce36f36e448f5a0ea16747b6862dac47be1d10ce: Oh yes... I remember, you asked me to stop fossils dropping for you on the island.
textByHash.b1997d2a759cc96e7a5181085270e567edb5a148: Of course you are! I'll get the word out and you'll start to see fossils drop again.
textByHash.939d9449ddd4340839bef8626ca9f843cf2c0efd: Okay... let me know if you actually change your mind.
textByHash.0c2737d6a974b4955c8d6695e1a309d4a3c993a9: That has been done, rare fossils won't drop for you anymore. Come back to me if you change your mind.
textByHash.c76d93b20f202fdf4b7df890f99f16463e3510ff: Excellent, you'll start to see rare fossils showing up on the island again.
textByHash.0c00871e2e02fb352e5065bf9ce3ac71d37ab0ad: Fine, regular fossils won't drop for you anymore. Come back to me if you change your mind
textByHash.4ce6055040e5433195bca9c74cf23a23238a7932: Great! You'll start to see fossils showing up on the island again.
